nodes.name: Nectar of the Gods
nodes.description: name: Nectar of the Gods | short_description: nectar of the gods | meal_suggestion: Serve this divine breakfast chilled or at room temperature, perhaps accompanied by ambrosia or fresh seasonal fruits
nodes.premise: Meal: Nectar of the Gods - name: Nectar of the Gods | short_description: nectar of the gods | meal_suggestion: Serve this divine breakfast chilled or at room temperature, perhaps accompanied by ambrosia or fresh seasonal fruits to complement its heavenly sweetness. | ingredients: {'name': 'honey'}, {'name': 'pomegranate seeds'}, {'name': 'greek yogurt'}, {'name': 'figs'}, {'name': 'golden nectar'} | nutrition_note: A high-energy, antioxidant-rich meal featuring natural sugars from honey and fruit, balanced with protein from yogurt. Truly a legendary start to the day.

nodes.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Bowl
nodes.description: name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Bowl | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a breakfast bowl. Add a handful of nuts
nodes.premise: Meal: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Bowl - name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Bowl | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a breakfast bowl. Add a handful of nuts or a spoonful of yogurt for extra protein and healthy fats; optional maple syrup drizzle if desired. | nutrition_note: High-fiber combination of oats and apple provides steady energy and fullness; milk supplies protein and calcium; cinnamon adds flavor with negligible calories; no added sugars in the listed ingredients.

nodes.name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Bake
nodes.description: name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Bake | short_description: Creamy overnight oats with milk, plain yogurt, apple, and cinnamon; a fiber- and protein-forward breakfast with a citrus-inspired twist. |
nodes.premise: Meal: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Bake - name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Bake | short_description: Creamy overnight oats with milk, plain yogurt, apple, and cinnamon; a fiber- and protein-forward breakfast with a citrus-inspired twist. | meal_suggestion: To emphasize the Citrus Fresh concept, add orange zest or a splash of orange juice before refrigerating; pair with a handful of nuts or seeds for healthy fats and extra protein; serve chilled or lightly warmed. | nutrition_note: Fiber- and protein-rich breakfast from oats and dairy; apple adds fiber and micronutrients; calcium from milk and plain yogurt supports bone health; cinnamon enhances flavor with little sugar; overall balanced, with sugar level influenced by dairy choice; to lean into the citrus theme, consider adding a touch of orange zest.
